steps.title: Match the singular subject
steps.content: The subject of the verb is 'each one,' which is singular. The phrase 'which include Henry V and Richard III' interrupts the subject and verb but does not change the subject's number.

steps.title: Use singular present tense
steps.content: Choice B uses the plural verb 'focus.' Choice C changes the structure to a plural passive form. Choice D uses plural past passive. The sentence needs a singular present-tense verb for 'each one.' The answer is A.
